scope.target: Navigation, lifecycle status, historical labeling, install-path, and implementation-outcome correctness
constraints: Retain published paths and historical records
Mark obsolete templates historical or deprecated instead of deleting them
Add outcomes only where completion evidence is available

steps: Repair active index and stale status facts
Label obsolete auditor workflow templates as historical or deprecated
Add evidence-backed implementation outcomes to completed requirements
Run link, index, and lifecycle checks
execution.last_completed_step: Repaired workflow discovery, marked retained auditor workflow templates historical, modernized install and skill-guide facts, neutralized bounded source residue, and recorded evidence-backed requirement outcomes.

results.summary: Active workflow discovery now reports only active work; retained auditor workflow templates route readers to standalone assessments; guides, examples, historical mappings, and completed requirements no longer present stale lifecycle or future-package truth.
tests_run: JSON/YAML parse and focused stale-content scans
results.residual_risk: The historical auditor workflow templates remain at published paths by design; physical retirement and enforcement remain ENF-001 v0.5.0 scope.
